response.reasoning: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Strong TypeScript/Node.js background at Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and re:cinq. React experience confirmed at Optilyz. Recent re:cinq role explicitly covers AI agent infrastructure and MCP work, matching the AI agent requirement. Databases (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL), Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and Git all present. Java listed in skills, and polyglot background (TypeScript, D, Java, C++, C#, Swift, PHP) demonstrates language flexibility. TDD/craftsmanship orientation is a strong cultural fit for testing-heavy stack (Vitest). Gaps: Nest.js not mentioned, Vitest not explicitly named (Jest-style testing implied), Kotlin not listed, depth of React work unclear compared to backend focus.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js track record
Direct AI agent / MCP experience at current re:cinq role matches a key requirement
Solid foundation in TDD, testing, Docker/K8s, AWS, and multiple databases
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older and limited
React exposure appears secondary to backend work; frontend depth uncertain

key_factors.factor: Current AI agent and MCP work

response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar and hits the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, testing discipline, cloud, containers) plus the harder-to-find AI agent requirement via active MCP work. Gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are framework-level and learnable for an engineer of this seniority. Worth interviewing to validate React depth and confirm fit with Nest.js conventions.
